description_long: This is a glossy black grand piano with a partially open lid, revealing the strings and internal components. The piano features a full-sized keyboard with alternating white and black keys, and a visible pedal assembly beneath the keyboard. The body is constructed with a curved right side and a straight left edge, typical of grand pianos, and stands on three sturdy legs. The lid is propped up, allowing a view into the soundboard and hammers. The surface is highly reflective, giving it a sleek and polished appearance. There is a small, gold-colored brand or logo plate above the keyboard.
description: A glossy black grand piano with a partially open lid, full keyboard, and visible pedals, featuring a reflective, polished surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, three legs, and a gold-colored brand plate above the keys.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the piano's length, curved body, and the open lid exposing the internal strings.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the curved back and the open lid, with less visibility of the keyboard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the straight edge, lid support, and the pedal assembly beneath the keyboard.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard 88-key layout with alternating white and black keys, no visible missing or non-standard keys.
